sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) a bee, Isa 7:18 plur. דְּבֹרִים Jud. 14:18 Psa 118:12. Syr. ܕܶܒܘܽܪܬܳܐ a bee, a wasp. Arabic دِبْرُ collect. a swarm of bees, or wasps, qs. exagimen, ab exagendo, see דָּבַר No. 2 (like agmen qs. agimen, also ab agendo). The Hebrew word, however, is a noun of unity, from the unused דְּבֹור=دْبُِر.

(2) [Deborah], pr.n. of a prophetess of the Israelites, Jud. 4:4 , Jdg 4:5 5:1 . [Also another, Gen 35:8.]
